commit_message: fix: uc jump instructions fix: uc jump instructions This pull request introduces a new automated script for compiling and running VHDL modules, along with some corrections to the FSM testbench architecture naming and logic fixes in the control unit. The main highlight is the addition of a comprehensive Bash script to streamline simulation and waveform viewing, improving developer workflow and consistency. Additionally, minor but important fixes are made to VHDL files to ensure correct testbench
